mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supply_claim_line(order_id, item_id, qty, snapshot_name, fulfilled_qty) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{itemId}, #{qty}, #{snapshotName}, #{fulfilledQty})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM supply_claim_line WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE supply_claim_line SET fulfilled_qty = #{fulfilledQty} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.fulfilled_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS outboundTime, l.order_id AS claimId, l.snapshot_name AS itemName, l.qty AS applyQty, l.fulfilled_qty AS outboundQty, o.user_id AS applicantUserId, o.fulfilled_by AS fulfilledByUserId FROM supply_claim_line l INNER JOIN supply_claim_order o ON o.id = l.order_id WHERE l.item_id = #{itemId} AND IFNULL(o.deleted, 0) = 0 AND o.status = 'FULFILLED' AND IFNULL(l.fulfilled_qty, 0) > 0 ORDER BY o.fulfilled_at DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supply_claim_line l INNER JOIN supply_claim_order o ON o.id = l.order_id WHERE l.item_id = #{itemId} AND IFNULL(o.deleted, 0) = 0 AND o.status = 'FULFILLED' AND IFNULL(l.fulfilled_qty, 0) > 0
